zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：止损。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is showing a modestly constructive short-term bias, with the latest price at 0.161931 trading above the 20-period simple moving average of 0.159106. The 24-hour gain of 0.27% is relatively small, but the ability to remain above the moving average suggests buyers continue to maintain control of near-term momentum. The narrow trading range between 0.160021 and 0.162327 indicates consolidation, often a precursor to a directional move once volatility expands.

Momentum indicators provide a cautiously positive outlook. While RSI data is unavailable, the MACD value of 0.000475 suggests underlying bullish momentum remains present. The absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation, yet the positive MACD value generally reflects strengthening buying pressure. Traders should monitor whether price can sustain closes above current levels, as this would reinforce the positive momentum profile and increase the probability of a continuation higher.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 0.1600, corresponding closely with the session low, while stronger support can be identified around the SMA(20) region near 0.1591. On the upside, initial resistance appears at 0.1623, the recent intraday high. A decisive break above this level could open the path toward higher short-term targets as momentum traders enter the market. Failure to overcome resistance may keep the pair range-bound in the near term.

For trading purposes, bullish participants may consider buying pullbacks toward the 0.1600–0.1591 support zone while maintaining disciplined risk management below support. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 0.1623 before establishing new long positions. Conversely, bearish strategies appear less attractive while price remains above the moving average, though a breakdown below 0.1591 would weaken the current structure and could signal a shift toward a more defensive outlook.
